transcript: Bhai, main Koramangala 5th Block mein hun, aaja jaldi.
Interview hai kal Indiranagar mein, 100 Feet Road pe office hai.
Whitefield bohot door hai yaar, peak time mein 2 ghante lagte hain.
Mera kaam Electronic City Phase 1 mein hai, night shift hai.
Ek kaam kar, Marathahalli bridge ke paas aa ja, wahan milte hain.
Jayanagar 4th Block mein ek acha tiffin center hai, sham ko chalein?
Shift khatam hote hi Rajajinagar main station se bus pakad lena.
Hebbal flyover pe traffic bahut zyada hai, alternative route lo.
Naya makaan Yelahanka mein liya hai, rent bhi kam hai wahan.
Bus number 500C pakad lo, seedha Banashankari temple tak jaayegi.
HSR Layout Sector 2 mein ek vacancy hai, tu apply kar.
BTM Layout 2nd stage pe mera dost rehta hai, ussse pooch.
Majestic se KSRTC bus pakad, directly Mysore jaayegi.
Silk Board junction pe mat ruk, jam mein phans jaayega.
Bellandur ke paas ek naya warehouse khula hai, driver chahiye.
Sarjapur Road pe bahut saare IT companies hain, try kar wahan.
Bommanahalli mein security guard ki position khali hai, interested hai kya?
KR Puram railway station ke paas kaam mil sakta hai, jaake dekh.
Peenya Industrial Area mein factory workers chahiye, salary bhi theek hai.
Yeshwanthpur mandi ke paas loading ka kaam hai, subah 5 baje se.
